The '''Nationalist Army''' was the military of the [[Jabiimi Nationalists]]. Their military forces in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] included the [[Nimbus commando]]s, tanks, various [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]], and a genetically-engineered virus. In the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], they used [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]], [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]], [[HAVw A6 Juggernaut/Legends|Juggernauts]], and [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]].
